SEARCH
Package com.txstate.bloodhound.service

Class RecordManager

java.lang.Object
com.txstate.bloodhound.service.RecordManager
public class RecordManager extends Object
Main service façade coordinating validation, classification, persistence, analytics, and export.

  • Constructor Details

    • RecordManager

      public RecordManager()
      Creates a record manager with default concrete dependencies.

    • RecordManager

      public RecordManager(FileStorageService storageService, ValidationService validationService, BloodPressureClassifier bloodPressureClassifier, LipidClassifier lipidClassifier, AnalyticsEngine analyticsEngine, ExportService exportService)
      Creates a record manager with explicit collaborators.
      Parameters:
      storageService - storage service for primary and backup files
      validationService - validator for incoming records
      bloodPressureClassifier - classifier for blood pressure categories
      lipidClassifier - classifier for lipid categories and alerts
      analyticsEngine - analytics engine for aggregate computations
      exportService - CSV export service

  • Method Details

    • initializeStorage

      public StorageInitializationResult initializeStorage()
      Initializes storage and loads records into memory.
      Returns:
      startup initialization result including warnings/recovery information

    • addRecord

      public OperationResult<AddRecordResponse> addRecord(HealthRecord inputRecord)
      Adds a health record after validation and classification, then persists it.
      Parameters:
      inputRecord - incoming record draft
      Returns:
      operation result containing persisted record and generated alerts

    • viewRecords

      public List<HealthRecord> viewRecords()
      Returns all records sorted by timestamp descending.
      Returns:
      sorted copy of records

    • filterRecordsByDateRange

      public OperationResult<List<HealthRecord>> filterRecordsByDateRange(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns records within a date range (inclusive) sorted descending by timestamp.
      Parameters:
      startDate - start date (inclusive)
      endDate - end date (inclusive)
      Returns:
      operation result containing filtered records or validation errors

    • viewAnalytics

      public AnalyticsResult viewAnalytics()
      Computes analytics from current in-memory records.
      Returns:
      aggregate analytics snapshot

    • exportAllRecordsToCsv

      public OperationResult<Path> exportAllRecordsToCsv(Path destination)
      Exports current records to CSV.
      Parameters:
      destination - destination CSV path
      Returns:
      operation result containing exported path or failure details

    • getRecordsSnapshot

      public List<HealthRecord> getRecordsSnapshot()
      Returns a snapshot copy of in-memory records.
      Returns:
      copy of current in-memory record list

    • buildRiskAlerts

      private List<String> buildRiskAlerts(HealthRecord record, LipidClassification lipidClassification)
